source: Author Test Cases - True or False.pdf
note: Auto-extracted from QC PDF via pdf-parse. "raw" preserves verbatim PDF text per case for traceability; refine desc/steps/expected during component automation.

testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01 True or FalseUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal. kitaboo.com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02 True or False FunctionalityVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to start authoring
testcases.expected: Click on start authoring Should redirect to New Activity creation page
testcases.raw: TC_03 True or False FunctionalityVerify if user is able to start authoring 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoring Should redirect to New Activity creation page

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to add Generic step
testcases.expected: Add Generic step User Should able add Generic step
testcases.raw: TC_04 True or False FunctionalityVerify if user is able to add Generic step 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step User Should able add Generic step

testcases.description: Verify if user able to enter the step title
testcases.expected: Enter the Step Title User Should able to Enter Data in Step Title
testcases.raw: TC_05 True or False FunctionalityVerify if user able to enter the step title 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title User Should able to Enter Data in Step Title

testcases.description: Verify that the cancel button is clickable in generic step creation
testcases.expected: click on cancel button The step creation pop up should be closed
testcases.raw: TC_06 True or False Functionality Verify that the cancel button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on cancel button The step creation pop up should be closed

testcases.description: Verify that the change step button is clickable in generic step creation
testcases.expected: click on change step button Clicking on Change step should redirect to Chosse step screen
testcases.raw: TC_07 True or False Functionality Verify that the change step button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on change step button Clicking on Change step should redirect to Chosse step screen

testcases.description: Verify the component renders correctlyAdd the True or False component to an activity Component is added with default header, instruction, and options
testcases.raw: TC_10 True or FalsePositiveVerify the component renders correctlyAdd the True or False component to an activity Component is added with default header, instruction, and options

testcases.description: Verify header text input
testcases.raw: TC_11 True or FalsePositiveVerify header text inputEnter text in Header field Header updates and displays entered text

testcases.description: Verify empty headerLeave header blank and preview No header is shown in preview and reader
testcases.raw: TC_12 True or FalseNegativeVerify empty headerLeave header blank and preview No header is shown in preview and reader

testcases.description: Verify instruction text input
testcases.raw: TC_13 True or FalsePositiveVerify instruction text inputEnter instruction text (e.g., "Choose one option") Instruction updates and displays correctly

testcases.description: Verify empty instructionLeave instruction blank Instruction area hidden or blank in reader
testcases.raw: TC_14 True or FalseNegativeVerify empty instructionLeave instruction blank Instruction area hidden or blank in reader

testcases.description: Verify option text input
testcases.raw: TC_15 True or FalsePositiveVerify option text inputEnter text for Option 1 and Option 2Options display entered text

testcases.description: Verify long option text wrapping
testcases.raw: TC_17 True or FalsePositiveVerify long option text wrappingEnter long text exceeding container widthText wraps correctly without overflow

testcases.description: Verify line break support
testcases.raw: TC_18 True or FalsePositiveVerify line break supportEnter text with line breaks in optionsLine breaks are preserved in reader

testcases.description: Verify removing mediaAdd media and then uncheck "Add Media" Media removed from preview and reader

testcases.description: Verify Feedback - Generic
testcases.raw: TC_27 True or FalsePositiveVerify Feedback - GenericEnable Generic feedback On submission, generic feedback message shows regardless of option

testcases.description: Verify Feedback - Individual
testcases.raw: TC_28 True or FalsePositiveVerify Feedback - IndividualEnable Individual feedback On submission, different feedback messages show for each option

testcases.description: Verify Feedback - Try Again
testcases.raw: TC_29 True or FalsePositiveVerify Feedback - Try AgainEnable Try Again feedback When wrong option selected, prompt to try again without revealing answer

testcases.description: Verify Feedback - Add Show Me
testcases.raw: TC_30 True or FalsePositiveVerify Feedback - Add Show MeEnable Add Show Me feedback When wrong option selected, user can click "Show Me" to reveal correct answer

testcases.description: Verify Feedback - Shuffle Choices
testcases.raw: TC_31 True or FalsePositiveVerify Feedback - Shuffle ChoicesEnable Shuffle Choices Options are displayed in random order each load

testcases.description: Verify Feedback - Reset
testcases.raw: TC_32 True or FalsePositiveVerify Feedback - ResetEnable Reset User can reset and reattempt after submitting

testcases.description: Verify selecting correct option Mark Option 1 as correct, select in preview, submitSuccess feedback shows

testcases.raw: TC_34 True or FalsePositiveVerify selecting incorrect optionMark Option 2 as correct, select Option 1Failure or Try Again feedback shows

testcases.description: Verify reordering options manuallyDrag Option 2 above Option 1Order updates and persists after save

testcases.description: Verify alt text for mediaAdd alt text for image/videoAlt text available for screen readers

testcases.description: Verify error on invalid media formatUpload unsupported file typeError message displays

testcases.description: True or FalseEdgeVerify removing all media and feedbackSave component without media/feedback Component saves and renders empty state gracefully

testcases.description: Verify Generic Feedback when correct option selected
testcases.raw: TC_50 True or FalsePositive Verify Generic Feedback when correct option selected 1. Enable Generic Feedback. 2. Enter custom Correct and Incorrect messages. 3. Select correct option in preview. 4. Click Submit. Generic Correct feedback message displays (e.g., “Congratulations! Your answer is correct.”)

testcases.description: Verify Generic Feedback when incorrect option selected
testcases.raw: TC_51 True or FalsePositive Verify Generic Feedback when incorrect option selected 1. Enable Generic Feedback. 2. Select incorrect option. 3. Click Submit. Generic Incorrect feedback message displays (e.g., “Oops! You have selected the wrong answer.”)

testcases.description: True or FalseEdgeVerify Generic Feedback with empty messages
testcases.raw: TC_52 True or FalseEdgeVerify Generic Feedback with empty messages 1. Enable Generic Feedback .2. Leave both messages blank. 3. Submit any option. Default system feedback messages display

testcases.description: Verify Try Again Feedback on first incorrect attempt
testcases.raw: TC_53 True or FalsePositive Verify Try Again Feedback on first incorrect attempt 1. Enable Try Again Feedback. 2. Set Number of attempts = 2. 3. Select incorrect option.4. Submit. “Try Again” prompt appears, allowing user to reattempt

testcases.description: Verify Try Again Feedback decrements attempt count
testcases.raw: TC_54 True or FalsePositive Verify Try Again Feedback decrements attempt count 1. Enable Try Again Feedback with 2 attempts. 2. Submit incorrect option twice. 3. Submit again. After last attempt, final feedback is shown; no further reattempt allowed

testcases.description: Verify Try Again Feedback with Number of attempts = 1
testcases.raw: TC_55 True or FalsePositive Verify Try Again Feedback with Number of attempts = 1 1. Set attempts = 1. 2. Submit incorrect option. 3. Try submitting again. “Try Again” appears once; second submission triggers final feedback

testcases.description: Verify Add Show Me Feedback functionality
testcases.raw: TC_56 True or FalsePositiveVerify Add Show Me Feedback functionality 1. Enable Add Show Me Feedback. 2. Submit incorrect option. 3. Click “Show Me” button. Correct option is highlighted and revealed

testcases.description: Verify Add Show Me with Try Again enabled
testcases.raw: TC_57 True or FalsePositiveVerify Add Show Me with Try Again enabled 1. Enable Try Again and Add Show Me. 2. Submit incorrect option 3. After failed attempts, click “Show Me”. System displays correct answer only after all attempts are exhausted

testcases.description: Verify Add Show Me disabled
testcases.raw: TC_58 True or FalsePositiveVerify Add Show Me disabled 1. Disable Add Show Me. 2. Submit incorrect option.No “Show Me” button appears

testcases.description: Verify Reset icon resets selection and feedback
testcases.raw: TC_59 True or FalsePositiveVerify Reset icon resets selection and feedback 1. Select an option. 2. Submit and view feedback. 3. Click the Reset icon. All selections and feedback are cleared; user can reattempt

testcases.description: Verify Reset without prior submission
testcases.raw: TC_60 True or FalsePositiveVerify Reset without prior submission 1. Select option but do not submit. 2. Click Reset icon.Option selection clears

testcases.description: Verify feedback in Reader after publishing
testcases.raw: TC_61 True or FalsePositiveVerify feedback in Reader after publishing 1. Publish the activity with all feedback enabled. 2. Launch in Reader. 3. Complete submission flow. Same feedback behavior works identically in Reader

testcases.description: Verify Reset icon hidden when Reset disabled
testcases.raw: TC_62 True or FalsePositiveVerify Reset icon hidden when Reset disabled 1. Disable Reset in Settings. 2. Preview component.Reset icon not displayed

testcases.description: Verify combination: Generic + Try Again + Add Show Me + Reset
testcases.raw: TC_63 True or FalsePositive Verify combination: Generic + Try Again + Add Show Me + Reset 1. Enable all feedback options. 2. Submit incorrect option. 3. Use Try Again, Show Me, and Reset. All feedback and controls function together without conflicts

testcases.description: Verify line breaks in Generic Feedback messages
testcases.raw: TC_64 True or FalsePositive Verify line breaks in Generic Feedback messages 1. Enter line breaks in Correct/Incorrect messages. 2. Submit.Feedback text respects line breaks

testcases.description: Verify special characters in Generic Feedback
testcases.raw: TC_65 True or FalseSecurityVerify special characters in Generic Feedback 1. Add special characters (&, %, <, >) in messages. 2. Submit. Special characters are displayed safely, not rendered as HTML

testcases.description: Verify feedback accessibility (screen reader)
testcases.raw: TC_66 True or FalseAccessibilityVerify feedback accessibility (screen reader) 1. Submit an answer. 2. Use screen reader. Feedback text is read aloud by assistive technology

testcases.description: Verify Try Again resets option selection after each attempt
testcases.raw: TC_67 True or FalsePositive Verify Try Again resets option selection after each attempt 1. Enable Try Again with 2 attempts. 2. Submit incorrect option. 3. Observe behavior. Option remains selected or clears as per design spec (to be verified)

testcases.description: True or FalseEdge Verify feedback persists on page reload before reset
testcases.raw: TC_68 True or FalseEdge Verify feedback persists on page reload before reset 1. Submit an answer. 2. Reload page. 3. Observe feedback state. Feedback persists or resets per system spec

testcases.description: True or FalseEdge Verify no feedback displayed when all feedback options are disabled
testcases.raw: TC_69 True or FalseEdge Verify no feedback displayed when all feedback options are disabled 1. Uncheck all feedback options. 2. Submit answer.No feedback appears

testcases.description: Verify Individual Feedback for correct option
testcases.raw: TC_70 True or FalsePositiveVerify Individual Feedback for correct option 1. Enable Individual Feedback. 2. Enter text in correct option feedback. 3. Select correct option. 4. Submit. Correct option-specific feedback is displayed.

testcases.description: Verify Individual Feedback for incorrect option
testcases.raw: TC_71 True or FalsePositiveVerify Individual Feedback for incorrect option 1. Enable Individual Feedback. 2. Enter text in incorrect option feedback. 3. Select incorrect option. 4. Submit. Incorrect option-specific feedback is displayed.

testcases.description: True or FalseEdge Verify Individual Feedback fallback when no text entered
testcases.raw: TC_72 True or FalseEdge Verify Individual Feedback fallback when no text entered 1. Enable Individual Feedback. 2. Leave feedback field blank. 3. Submit any option. No feedback displayed or default generic feedback shown (as per spec).

testcases.description: Verify editing Individual Feedback updates content
testcases.raw: TC_73 True or FalsePositive Verify editing Individual Feedback updates content 1. Enter feedback text. 2. Save activity. 3. Re-edit text. 4. Submit answer.Latest edited feedback is shown.

testcases.description: Verify Individual Feedback persists after publishing
testcases.raw: TC_74 True or FalsePositive Verify Individual Feedback persists after publishing 1. Publish activity with Individual Feedback enabled. 2. Launch in Reader. 3. Submit answer. Feedback works the same in Reader mode.

testcases.description: Verify adding video feedback to an option
testcases.raw: TC_75 True or FalsePositiveVerify adding video feedback to an option 1. Enable Individual Feedback. 2. Upload video feedback file for an option. 3. Submit answer.Video playback is available as feedback.

testcases.description: Verify enabling Video by URL
testcases.raw: TC_76 True or FalsePositiveVerify enabling Video by URL 1. Check Add Media .2. Select Video. 3. Select Upload by URL.URL input field is visible and enabled.

testcases.description: Verify entering valid YouTube URL ID
testcases.raw: TC_77 True or FalsePositiveVerify entering valid YouTube URL ID 1. Enter valid YouTube video ID. 2. Save activity. 3. Submit answer. Video player loads and displays video thumbnail.

testcases.description: Verify video playback from URL
testcases.raw: TC_78 True or FalsePositiveVerify video playback from URL 1. Enter valid YouTube video ID. 2. Submit answer. 3. Click Play.Video streams and plays correctly.

testcases.description: Verify invalid YouTube video ID handling
testcases.raw: TC_79 True or FalseNegativeVerify invalid YouTube video ID handling 1. Enter invalid YouTube ID (e.g., “xyz”). 2. Submit answer. Error message displayed or no video loads.

testcases.description: Verify empty YouTube video ID field
testcases.raw: TC_80 True or FalseNegativeVerify empty YouTube video ID field 1. Leave video ID empty. 2. Submit answer. No video appears; system handles gracefully without errors.

testcases.description: Verify switching from Upload by URL to Upload by System
testcases.raw: TC_81 True or FalsePositive Verify switching from Upload by URL to Upload by System 1. Enter video ID. 2. Switch to Upload by System. 3. Upload a video. 4. Submit answer.Uploaded video replaces URL video.

testcases.description: Verify deleting URL video input
testcases.raw: TC_82 True or FalsePositiveVerify deleting URL video input 1. Enter video ID. 2. Remove it (clear field). 3. Submit answer.No video feedback is shown.

testcases.description: Verify combining Video by URL with text feedback
testcases.raw: TC_83 True or FalsePositive Verify combining Video by URL with text feedback 1. Enter video ID. 2. Enter text feedback. 3. Submit answer. Both video and text feedback are displayed.

testcases.description: Verify alignment of video when set to Right
testcases.raw: TC_84 True or FalsePositiveVerify alignment of video when set to Right 1. Enter video ID. 2. Select Align: Right. 3. Submit answer. Video appears on the right side of the component.

testcases.description: Verify alignment of video when set to Left
testcases.raw: TC_85 True or FalsePositiveVerify alignment of video when set to Left 1. Enter video ID. 2. Select Align: Left. 3. Submit answer.Video appears on the left side.

testcases.description: True or FalseUsabilityVerify responsiveness on different screen sizes
testcases.raw: TC_86 True or FalseUsabilityVerify responsiveness on different screen sizes 1. Enter video ID. 2. Submit answer. 3. View on mobile/tablet. Video resizes responsively without cropping.

testcases.description: Verify video URL persists after saving and reloading editor
testcases.raw: TC_87 True or FalsePositive Verify video URL persists after saving and reloading editor 1. Enter video ID. 2. Save. 3. Reopen activity in editor.Video ID remains populated.

testcases.description: Verify accessibility labels for video
testcases.raw: TC_88 True or FalseAccessibilityVerify accessibility labels for video 1. Submit answer with video feedback. 2. Use screen reader. Video is announced with appropriate labels (e.g., “video feedback”).

testcases.description: Verify unsupported video platform handling
testcases.raw: TC_89 True or FalseNegativeVerify unsupported video platform handling 1. Try entering a Vimeo or non-YouTube ID. 2. Submit answer.Error shown or video not loaded.

testcases.description: Verify security handling of invalid or malicious URLs
testcases.raw: TC_90 True or FalseFunctionality Verify security handling of invalid or malicious URLs 1. Enter script injection as video ID (e.g., <script>alert(1)</script>).2. Submit answer.Input sanitized and no script executes.
